FAQ

Frequently Asked Questions

Still have questions? Message us on Viber anytime.

How do I book a unit?
Message us on Viber (+63 995 182 8466) or WhatsApp (+63 929 801 0815) to check availability. We confirm within minutes and send GCash/Maya payment details to lock in your dates.
Is the price really lower than Airbnb?
Yes. Booking direct means we skip the 15–20% platform commission — same rooms starting from ₱2,400/night vs ₱3,000+ on Airbnb.
Do all units have a private bathroom?
Yes — every studio has its own en-suite private bathroom. You never share with other guests.
What's included in the rate?
WiFi, air conditioning (22 hours), linens, towels, and building amenities access. No hidden charges at check-out.
Can I check in early or check out late?
Early check-in and late check-out are subject to availability. Message us when booking and we'll do our best.
Are the 7 Ortigas units in the same building?
Yes — all 7 are in Shine Residences, Meralco Ave, Pasig. Great if you're booking for a group or corporate team.
Can I pay in cash?
We prefer GCash or Maya for deposits. Cash on arrival may be arranged — please discuss when booking.
